Variables.Name: visible
Values: true if player has entered vent

Variables.Name: hidden
Values: hidden if player has not entered lower grate or if player has exited back to main floor

Variables.Name: path
Values: enforcer should move from one painted square to an adjacent painted square that it has not occupied in at least 4 turns

Variables.Name: path
Values: enforcer moves from currently occupied square to a square that it has not occupied in at least 4 turns

TileDefs.Script: each instance should choose one static frame.
can be used to trigger collapse
